industry: Premium THC Beverage Distribution for Hospitality
voice: Confident B2B beverage-sales, hospitality-grade — sells margin and repeat business to bar owners, never giggly about THC. The tone is sophisticated and professional.
logo_style_brief: A confident distribution wordmark complemented by a small, flat spirit/beverage motif, evoking a craft-spirits-importer feel, primarily in charcoal-green and copper.
photo_style_tokens: moody premium bar lighting, warm wood and brass, editorial drinks photography

facts_from_brief.carried_brands: HiSide, Howdy, THC Social, Stay Cool, SUP, 8th Wonder, Tempters, CURRNT, Don't Be That Dude
facts_from_brief.product_details: Hemp-derived Delta-9 THC drinks, legal in Missouri, 21+ only
facts_from_brief.target_audience: Bars, restaurants, liquor stores and on-premise accounts
facts_from_brief.product_trio: Spirit Bottles (for shots + cocktails, 'Hightails'), RTD Cans (ready-to-drink social beverages), THC Drops (turn any alcohol-free drink into a THC drink)

invented: Tagline: Serve What's Next. Elevated Revenue.
Fonts: Libre Franklin for heading, Inter for body.
Brand name: Arch & Prairie Beverage Co.
Industry specificity: Premium THC Beverage Distribution for Hospitality.
